# saas-reverse

> Reverse-engineer any SaaS into a build blueprint: features, pricing, moat analysis, churn vectors, real tech stack, and a build prompt for AI coding assistants.

## What it does

Enter a SaaS domain (e.g. notion.so, linear.app) and get a structured breakdown:

- What the product actually does, for whom, and at what price
- Feature map, tagged Core / Differentiator / Table stakes
- Business model: free tier limits, paid tiers, the exact upgrade trigger
- Moat analysis: network effects, switching costs, data, brand, scored honestly
- Top churn vectors inferred from pricing and feature gaps
- Real tech stack, tagged by whether it was directly observed or inferred
- Build complexity estimate in days for a 2-person team
- A complete build prompt ready to paste into Claude Code, Cursor, or any AI coding assistant

Every analyzed domain becomes its own page at saas-reverse.com/{domain}, each with a unique title, description, and canonical URL.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://saas-reverse.com): enter a domain, run an analysis
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Badi21/saas-reverse): source code, GPL-3.0 licensed
- [Sitemap](https://saas-reverse.com/sitemap.xml): all analyzed domains

## Facts

- Free to use, no signup or account required
- Analysis takes roughly 30-50 seconds, cached for 6 hours per domain
- Built with Next.js 15, Groq (Llama 3.3 70B) for the analysis, Postgres (Neon) for the cache
- Open source under the GPL-3.0 license
- Also available as a Claude Code skill for running analyses from the CLI

## Contact

Issues, source, and licensing: https://github.com/Badi21/saas-reverse
